payload.summary_zh: GEOFlow 2.0.2 优化后台自动化工作流首页、提升数据分析统计真实性，统一 AI/搜索蜘蛛识别规则，修复访问日志与分发数据筛选边界，并改善 Docker 开发环境代码缓存行为。
payload.summary_en: GEOFlow 2.0.2 improves the admin automation workflow dashboard, makes Analytics metrics more faithful to event and access-log data, unifies AI/search crawler classification, fixes log and distribution filtering edges, and improves Docker development cache behavior.
payload.upgrade_tip_zh: 升级前请备份数据库、.env、uploads、storage 和目标渠道站点包；升级后请重新清理配置/视图缓存，并按分发管理页面提示重新下载目标站点包。
payload.upgrade_tip_en: Before upgrading, back up your database, .env, uploads, storage, and target-site packages. After upgrading, clear config/view caches and download the refreshed target-site package from Distribution Management.
